reason: This is a common Islamic prayer for protection and guidance, with no extremist content or ISIS-specific rhetoric. The text asks Allah for protection in all states (standing, sitting, lying) and protection from enemies and envious people.
original_post: اللهم احفظني بالإسلام قائما، واحفظني بالإسلام قاعدا، واحفظني بالإسلام راقدا، ولا تشمت بي عدوا ولا حاسدا 784
